articles.title: Trump says Iran ceasefire is on 'massive life support'
articles.summary: The US president criticises an Iranian counteroffer to end the war, and says the month-long ceasefire is "unbelievably weak".

articles.title: US inflation jumps to 3.8% as energy costs surge from Iran war
